Independent read-only inspection confirms full consistency across plan, registry, service, validators, test, contract, contract-validator script, README, manifest, command-evidence, and review baseline.

Verified: (1) The pack exists as a generated plan pack (closeout-pack-plan.json:412) with 40 included_units matching the baseline; live_state pins CP00-368 with next_subphase RP12.P02.M04.S19, consistent with CP369 being the pack under closeout. (2) Deliverable distribution {test:8,contract:2,implementation:17,security_audit:4,ui:5,claude_review:2,failure_recovery:2} and micro-title distribution {Secondary Workflow Slice:4, Permission And Audit Binding:22, Synthetic Fixture Set:14} match registry requirements and are enforced by validateBillingCoreCp369Coverage (validators.js:1077). (3) Descriptor-only / no-write / no-real-data boundaries: freezeCp369Result (service.js:687) pins ~40 runtime/write/leak guards to false; validateBillingCoreCp369P02PermissionFixtureSliceDescriptor (validators.js:1112) rejects any drift; manifest declares production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false. (4) Authority boundary preserved: claude_is_final_approval:false, claude_packet.read_only:true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false — enforced in descriptor, no_write_attestation, contract, and model.test.js. (5) CP178+ review hardening: complete invalid_review_blockers list present (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, disabled_tools_run, missing_raw_output_reference, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_enterprise_trust_claim); readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON); review-request pins claude-opus-4-8/max/Read,Grep,Glob/read_only. (6) Hermes patterns used only for deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false), not product runtime. (7) Range continuity holds: CP368 (last RP12.P02.M04.S18, next S19) -> CP369 (first S19, last RP12.P02.M06.S14, next S15) -> CP370, with historical_pack_bindings ending at CP00-369.

The pack-level production_ready claim is appropriately false (status implemented_pending_review / implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout); the only positive readiness signal, production_ready_candidate, is correctly bounded to coverage.valid && slice.valid. No over-claim of enterprise trust or final approval. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are expectedly absent pre-closeout since they are produced from this review run and downstream adjudication; their absence is not a defect at review time. Unrelated dirty files (LDIP invalid-attempt JSON, workbook specs, docx) are correctly classified out of pack scope and were not treated as pack content.
